title: Assistant Relationship Manager (Credit Analyst/Corp Bank, $6.5K) (ID: 691966)
description:
Responsibilities:

• Assist Relationship Managers and leadership with strategic planning for marketing initiatives.

• Attend customer meetings to evaluate credit risks and identify business opportunities.

• Draft discussion sheets and deal memos for internal reviews and assist in finalizing comprehensive credit proposals.

• Collaborate with various teams to enhance the utilization of working capital facilities and promote the bank’s digital platforms and tools.

• Address client inquiries and foster relationships with domestic and international branches, as well as corporate clients.

• Manage new account openings and perform customer due diligence in line with compliance requirements.

• Prepare the necessary documentation for name clearance and customer onboarding, ensuring adherence to AML/KYC regulations.

• Oversee a portfolio of client accounts, monitoring key developments, covenants, and risk indicators, while preparing credit reviews.

• Generate periodic reports and assist in data analysis for various business needs.

Requirements:

• Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field.

• At least 3 years of experience as a Credit Analyst in Corporate or Investment Banking, with exposure to large corporate, asset-based lending, M&A, or investment deals.

• Proficiency in conducting detailed credit analysis to support banking transactions and decisions.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click on “Apply”. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
